mapper.select: select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE."OBJECT" where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
select count(0) from standardize_object o1 inner join standardize_outputobject o2 on o1.obj_guid = o2.obj_guid where to_char(o1.insert_date,'yyyy-mm-dd')= to_char(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd')
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.SYNLTEFIELD
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.SAMEWORD
select count(0) dataCount from SYNLTE.FIELDCODE
mapper.insert: insert into DGN_DATA_LARGE_SCREEN(module_id, module_name, data_info, create_time) VALUES (#{moduleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{dataInfo,jdbcType=CLOB},sysdate-1)
mapper.select: select nvl(sum(errorNumber), 0) errorNumber, nvl(sum(governanceFinish), 0) finishedNumber from DQC_HistoryExceptionTrack where createTime between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

SELECT SERVICE_IP dataName, count(distinct RESOURCE_ID) typeCount, nvl(TRUNC(sum(DATA_COUNT)/100000000,2), 0) dataCount FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE to_char(DATA_SEND_TIME,'yyyyMMdd') = to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY SERVICE_IP

select v.CODEID dataId, v.CODETEXT dataName, nvl(TRUNC(t.dataCount/100000000,2), 0) dataCount, nvl(v.tablecount, 0) typeCount from ( select * from v_classify_info l left join (select PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as name ,count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date group by PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH) r on l.codeText = r.name where l.parcodeid = #{sjzzflCodeId}) v left join ( select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryClassifyCh, sum(table_all_count) as dataCount, count(distinct table_name_en) as typeCount from (SELECT PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,table_all_count,table_name_en FROM ( SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,j.table_all_count, j.table_name_en, row_number() over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where j.STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) group by PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH ) t on t.primaryClassifyCh = v.CODETEXT

select r.nodeinstanceid nodeInstanceId,to_char(r.endtime,'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime, r.statisticstr statisticStr, j.extrainfostr extraInfoStr, s.jobdataxjson jobDataxJson from jobexecuterecord r left join job j on r.jobid = j.id left join subjob s on s.jobid=j.id where r.status = 1 and r.endtime between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
select nvl(sum(totalcount), 0) dataCount, count(distinct name) typeCount from DGN_NOSTD_DISTRIBUTE_STATISTIC where totalcount > 0 and partitiontime >= #{startTime} and partitiontime <= #{endTime}

select lower(TABLE_PROJECT) tableProject, upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) tableName, case when PARTITION_MESSAGE = '1' then (case when count(distinct table_all_count) > 1 then 1 else 0 end) else(case when sum(table_all_count) > 0 then 1 else 0 end) end isUpdating from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN), PARTITION_MESSAGE

select days.dataTime, round(nvl(sum(m.dataCount), 0)/100000000, 2) dataCount from (select to_char(sysdate - LEVEL + 1, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from dual connect by LEVEL <= 7) days left join (select to_char(data_send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime, nvl(data_count, 0) dataCount from DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL) m on days.dataTime = m.dataTime group by days.dataTime order by days.dataTime
SELECT count(distinct resource_id) from DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE data_arrive_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
SELECT count(distinct RESOURCE_ID) typeCount, nvl(trunc(sum(DATA_COUNT)/100000000,2), 0) dataCount FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DATA_ARRIVE_TIME between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

select days.dataTime, nvl(sum(m.dataCount), 0) dataCount from (select to_char(sysdate - LEVEL + 1, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from dual connect by LEVEL <= 7) days left join (select to_char(data_arrive_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime, nvl(data_count, 0) dataCount from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL) m on days.dataTime = m.dataTime group by days.dataTime order by days.dataTime

select days.dataTime, m.sourceId from (select to_char(sysdate - LEVEL + 1, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from dual connect by LEVEL <= 2) days left join (select to_char(data_arrive_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime, resource_id sourceId from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL) m on days.dataTime = m.dataTime group by days.dataTime,m.sourceId order by days.dataTime

select service_ip nodeInstanceId, resource_id sourceId, sum(nvl(data_count, 0)) dataCount from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL where data_arrive_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by service_ip,resource_id
